requirements: Composer require any package-level composerRequires before seeding demo data.
Run package setup or demo commands listed in the package overview.
Authenticate as an admin user with the required role or permission.
Resolve admin-surface targets through Filament resource/page URLs when possible.
Resolve frontend-url targets through seeded demo routes or package route names.
Execute package-level browserTests when declared by the source screenshots manifest.

entries.title: Editorial timeline dashboard
entries.notes: Show the flagship timeline entry point with active drafts, review status, publish readiness, and recent workflow activity.

entries.title: Live preview
entries.notes: Show a signed preview URL rendering draft content before it reaches the live version.

entries.title: Preview link management
entries.notes: Show issued preview links with expiry, revocation, last accessed time, and access count.

entries.title: Compare and publish readiness
entries.notes: Show side-by-side changes, field comments, and publish checks before approval or release.

entries.title: Approval history
entries.notes: Show reviewer assignments and approve, reject, or request-changes decisions in timeline order.

entries.title: Scheduled publishing
entries.notes: Show release timing, scheduled publishing-studio, embargo-aware publishing windows, and queue state.

entries.title: Scheduler metadata
entries.notes: Show unpublish dates, embargo windows, and review reminders attached to a workspace.

entries.title: Stale drafts
entries.notes: Show stale workspace detection, review nudges, and cleanup actions for unfinished draft work.

entries.title: Recovery imports
entries.notes: Show recovery-center page import validation, relation resolution, execution state, and rollback reporting.

entries.title: Activity history
entries.notes: Show the audit-friendly content history across previews, comments, approvals, publishing, and rollback events.

entries.title: Rollback and restore
entries.notes: Show version history with restore context, rollback lineage, and the currently live version.

entries.title: Preview banner
entries.notes: Show the frontend workspace banner that confirms editors are viewing draft content and can exit preview mode.
